{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Seven Calamities battle requirement
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|A battle against any of the [[Seven Calamities]] would require all five [[Divine Titans]] or one [[Zenith Device]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c39">''The Knight'', chapter 39</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
